mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN T_IDM_USER au ON au.UserName = t.author_name AND au.UserStatus = '10' AND au.CompanyCode = '0100004' LEFT JOIN T_IDM_GROUP ag ON ag.GroupCode = au.DeptCode AND ag.CompanyCode = '0100004'

ISNULL(au.UserName, t.author_name) AS author_name_x, ISNULL(ag.GroupName, t.author_dept) AS author_dept_x, (SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = au.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE') AS author_position_x
mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, FROM tb_ehs_alert t
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.*, FROM tb_ehs_alert t
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT t.*, FROM tb_ehs_alert t
WHERE t.title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_alert WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_alert SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_alert (alert_id, title, title_en, title_zh, detail, detail_en, detail_zh, author_name, author_dept, author_email, author_company, is_auto_registration, views, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{alertId}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{detail}, #{detailEn}, #{detailZh}, #{authorName}, #{authorDept}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorCompany}, #{isAutoRegistration}, #{views}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_alert SET title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, detail = #{detail}, detail_en = #{detailEn}, detail_zh = #{detailZh}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, is_auto_registration = #{isAutoRegistration}, views = #{views}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
